name: Proscuitto with Melon Ribbons
recipeIngredient: 8 large Prosciutto Slices, very thinly sliced
1 large Wedge Of Ripe Cantaloupe, peeled
1 large Wedge Of Ripe Honeydew or Casaba Melon, peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange prosciutto slices in a single layer on a very large platter, covering the surface of the dish.
2. With a potato peeler, peel thin shavings of melon to create ribbons. Alternatively, use a Japanese mandoline or slicing machine for even thinner slices.
3. Drape the melon ribbons over the prosciutto.
4. Drizzle the entire platter with extra-virgin olive oil.
5. Scatter parsley leaves over the top.
Makes 6 servings.
